samples.xml_description:
<module id="adder_pipe_64bit">
    <description>Implement a 64-bit ripple carry adder with pipelining stages and registers to control data flow and synchronization.</description>
    <ports>
        <input id="clk">Clock input.</input>
        <input id="rst_n">Active low reset signal.</input>
        <input id="i_en">Enable signal for addition operation.</input>
        <input id="adda" width_description="[63:0]">64-bit input operand A.</input>
        <input id="addb" width_description="[63:0]">64-bit input operand B.</input>
        <output id="result" width_description="[64:0]">65-bit output representing the sum of adda and addb.</output>
        <output id="o_en">Output enable signal indicating the availability of the result.</output>
    </ports>
    <implementation>
        // Pipeline stages
        reg [63:0] adda_reg;
        reg [63:0] addb_reg;
        reg [63:0] sum_stage1;
        reg [63:0] sum_stage2;
        reg [63:0] sum_stage3;
        reg [63:0] sum_stage4;
        reg [63:0] sum_stage5;
        reg [63:0] sum_stage6;
        reg [63:0] sum_stage7;
        reg [63:0] sum_stage8;
        
        // Control signals
        reg i_en_reg;
        reg o_en;
        
        // Synchronize input enable signal
        always @(posedge clk or negedge rst_n) begin
            if (!rst_n) begin
                i_en_reg <= 1'b0;
            end else begin
                i_en_reg <= i_en;
            end
        end
        
        // Pipelined addition stages
        always @(posedge clk or negedge rst_n) begin
            if (!rst_n) begin
                adda_reg <= 64'd0;
                addb_reg <= 64'd0;
                sum_stage1 <= 64'd0;
                sum_stage2 <= 64'd0;
                sum_stage3 <= 64'd0;
                sum_stage4 <= 64'd0;
                sum_stage5 <= 64'd0;
                sum_stage6 <= 64'd0;
                sum_stage7 <= 64'd0;
                sum_stage8 <= 64'd0;
            end else if (i_en_reg) begin
                adda_reg <= adda;
                addb_reg <= addb;
                
                sum_stage1 <= adda_reg + addb_reg;
                sum_stage2 <= sum_stage1;
                sum_stage3 <= sum_stage2;
                sum_stage4 <= sum_stage3;
                sum_stage5 <= sum_stage4;
                sum_stage6 <= sum_stage5;
                sum_stage7 <= sum_stage6;
                sum_stage8 <= sum_stage7;
            end
        end
        
        // Update output enable signal
        always @(posedge clk or negedge rst_n) begin
            if (!rst_n) begin
                o_en <= 1'b0;
            end else begin
                o_en <= i_en_reg;
            end
        end
        
        // Assign final result
        assign result = {sum_stage8[63], sum_stage8};
    </implementation>
</module>
